body:
Closes #2928

This PR fixes advective forcing so that the velocities are correctly added so that upwind and WENO work.

This changes the advective forcing API as it removes the argument `advection_scheme`.

It also removes the scheme and advected tracer properties of the `AdvectiveForcing` struct so scripts using these will no longer work.
title: (0.87.0) Fix advective forcing for upwind advection schemes

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: `getregion` for `KernelFunctionOperation`
